message:
bd-3l83/bd-1247: JSONL schema validation, deep redaction, cost-budget telemetry, extension_popularity tests

Closes bd-3l83 (P1): Added JSONL schema validation (validate_jsonl/validate_jsonl_line),
deep JSON redaction (redact_json_value/find_unredacted_keys), and cost-budget telemetry
(CostThreshold/CostBudgetOutcome/check_cost_budget/default_cost_thresholds) to
tests/common/logging.rs with 30 new tests.

Closes bd-1247 (P1): Added 39 inline tests to src/extension_popularity.rs covering URL
parsing (all forms), slug guesses, GitHub/npm response parsing, serde round-trips. Fixed
clippy warnings (derive Eq, redundant closure, pass-by-value). Registered module in lib.rs.

Also added: 20 provider.rs tests, 10 agent_cx.rs tests, 5 session_sqlite.rs tests,
17 e2e_live.rs compilation fixes. Total: ~121 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
